completed_tasks.name: Run cargo test and fix snapshot/test regressions

remaining_tasks.name: Human verify: OpenPGP and PIV delete flows end-to-end

human_actions_pending.action: Verify OpenPGP delete flow: Keys screen -> select occupied slot -> press D -> enter Admin PIN -> confirm -> verify success + slot shows empty
human_actions_pending.context: Final gate for Phase 12 completion. All automated tests pass (160/160). Human sign-off required.

human_actions_pending.action: Verify PIV delete flow: PIV screen -> select occupied slot -> press D -> enter mgmt key (or Enter for default) -> confirm -> verify firmware-aware message + slot shows empty
human_actions_pending.context: Also verify edge cases: D on empty slot shows error; wrong PIN shows retry count; firmware < 5.7 shows note about key material.

decisions.decision: KeysScreen compose() must manually list 'd Delete Key Slot' action label
decisions.rationale: KEYS_BINDINGS show:true only renders to Footer widget strip, not the action label list in compose(). Label was missing and was added.

next_action: Run `cargo run` (with YubiKey) or `cargo run -- --mock` and perform human verification per 12-03-PLAN.md Task 2 checklist. Type 'approved' or describe issues.
context_notes: Phase 12 is 99% done. All 160 cargo tests pass, snapshots updated, clippy clean, no ratatui in model layer. Only the live/mock human verification of both delete flows remains before marking phase complete and updating ROADMAP.md. @mac called end of session 2026-03-29 — resume with human verify next session.
